generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SpeedControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for the ego vehicle's speed actuators via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, ensuring compliance with ISO 15622 (ACC performance class I)"
]

instance SteeringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles steering commands for the ego vehicle's chassis, implemented through motor voltage control mechanisms"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the ego vehicle's proximity (Hokuyo UST-10LX model)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Supplies 3D spatial data for environment perception (Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time data including ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected object tracks (lead vehicle position/velocity)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Streams
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance SensorFusionEvents : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataCollectionFE
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering for noise reduction in LiDAR point clouds, executed in ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Estimates object tracks using Kalman filtering, applied to processed sensor data in ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance ACCPerformanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Follows ISO 15622 (performance class I) to compute desired speed based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, CloudEdgeComputation
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks externally to the physical twin for off-board storage"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationPreProcessingFE
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing ego vehicle state data externally to the physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationPreProcessingFE
]

instance ProcessedSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated object tracks and ego vehicle state data in structured formats for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDatabase, EgoVehicleStateDatabase
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationFE
]

instance SerializedDataMessages : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data serialized/translated via Data Translation FE for compatibility across ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorFusionEvents
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication, message passing, and service orchestration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, ROS2Visualization
]

instance DBSCANClusteringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for noise reduction in point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance KalmanFilteringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering algorithm for object track estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables KalmanFilterModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and ego vehicle state data externally to the physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackDatabase, EgoVehicleStateDatabase
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for data pre-processing including DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for aggregating object tracks and ego vehicle state into structured formats"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackDatabase, EgoVehicleStateDatabase
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for unit conversions and message alignment ensuring compatibility across ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks"
    DTDFVocab:enables SerializedDataMessages
]

instance VisualizationPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Presentation Functional Entity for pre-processing data for human-readable formats (3D visualizations)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ProcessedSensorData
]

instance ROS2Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 visualization tools (e.g., RViz2) for real-time rendering of object tracks and driving paths"
    DTDFVocab:enables 3DVisualizationFE
]

instance CloudEdgeComputation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge infrastructure for offloading ACC control logic from on-board ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCPerformanceModel
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonHardware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano/Jetson NX hardware platform for compute-intensive tasks (LiDAR processing)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for software development on Jetson hardware"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, ROS2Visualization
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedSensorData
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from on-board ECUs to cloud/edge infrastructure, synchronized with ≤100ms latency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceModel
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC remotely via Control Panel UI, including enable/disable functionality, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides UserCommands
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable timeseries reports of vehicle state data for troubleshooting and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataReport
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ACCAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC accuracy (lead vehicle tracking error) and vehicle speed stability"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingResponseTime : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of emergency braking response times for safety validation"
]

instance SpeedStabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle speed stability during ACC operation"
]

instance OptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for ACC tuning (e.g., desired speed adjustments) via Report Generation FE"
]

instance HistoricalDataReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates timeseries reports of steering angle/speed data for troubleshooting PT behavior"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed through remote management interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking commands via remote management interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables/disables ACC functionality through remote management interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera,
                 VehicleStateSensor, SpeedControlActuator,
                 SteeringActuator, NVIDIAJetsonHardware
]

instance UserCommands : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "User commands for ACC control (enable/disable, speed setting, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedCommandAction, EmergencyBrakeAction, ACCEnableAction
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands to the PT via Wi-Fi network with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency, including:
  - **ACC Control**: Computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (ISO 15622) and forwards it to the **Actuation FE**, which converts it into motor voltage commands for the ego vehicle’s speed/steering actuators.
  - **Remote Management Commands**: Enables/disables ACC, sets desired speed, or triggers emergency braking via the **Control Panel UI FE** (User Interface FE). Actuation is executed on-board via ROS2 nodes and NVIDIA Jetson hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at a **real-time scale** with:
  - **Data Collection Rate**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state updated every perception cycle (typically <100 ms intervals, aligned with sensor refresh rates).
  - **Latency Constraints**:
    - End-to-end latency between PT and DT Entity ≤100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 specification for V2V communication).
    - Clock synchronization accuracy: ±100 ms across distributed devices to ensure event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Synchronization Method**: Uses ROS2’s built-in time synchronization mechanisms and Wi-Fi network timestamps for precise timing alignment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **orchestrated as a layered, entity-based architecture** following ISO 23247’s reference architecture (RA) with modifications:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor/actuator-specific logic (e.g., point cloud processing, actuation FE) and deviates from ISO 23247’s OME concept.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection, storage, and reporting (e.g., Data Collecting FE, Reporting FE).
  - **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE** (User Interface FE) to support operators/developers.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (e.g., ROS2 ↔ Wi-Fi message serialization). Components communicate via ROS2 (intra-entity) and Wi-Fi (inter-entity) with ≤100 ms latency."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **three lifecycle stages**:
  1. **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation (e.g., ACC algorithm prototyping, validation against ISO 15622 requirements).
  2. **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking testing, performance optimization).
  3. **Lifecycle Representation**: Covers the **operated** phase of the PT (as-manufactured/as-operated), with fidelity adjusted for scale (1/10th model) and safety-criticality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**:
    - Latency compliance (≤100 ms) via 3GPP TS 22.185.
    - Clock synchronization (±100 ms) for distributed systems.
    - ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic.
  - **Validation**:
    - Real-time performance tested on 1/10th-scale PT.
    - Object track accuracy validated via DBSCAN/Kalman filtering.
    - User interface (UI) usability validated through remote management testing.
  - **Uncertainty/Errors**:
    - Scale factor (1/10th) introduces geometric distortions but preserves relative motion dynamics.
    - Sensor noise mitigated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **Intra-Entity**: ROS2 (ROS 2.0) for inter-component communication (e.g., LiDAR ↔ Data Collection FE).
    - **Inter-Entity**: Wi-Fi (UDP-based) for PT ↔ DT Entity communication (≤100 ms latency).
  - **Communication Standards**:
    - ROS2’s built-in time synchronization and message serialization.
    - ISO 23247’s Data Translation FE ensures compatibility across heterogeneous data streams (e.g., LiDAR point clouds ↔ SQL database)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as follows:
  - **On-Board Hardware**: **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (for compute) and **Jetson NX** (for sensor processing) on the vehicle’s upper chassis.
  - **Off-Board Infrastructure**: Data storage (SQL database) and visualization components may reside on **cloud/edge servers** for scalability.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2 packages** are deployed as standalone services (not containerized per the document; no explicit mention of Docker/Kubernetes)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**:
    - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Communication**: Wi-Fi network enables remote management of ACC (e.g., emergency braking commands).
    - **Autonomous Driving Ecosystems**: Future extensions may integrate with other DTs (e.g., battery management systems) via standardized protocols (e.g., ROS2).
  - **Data Exchange**: Uses **Data Translation FE** to align messages between PT (ROS2) and DT (cloud/edge) environments."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **external to the vehicle** due to limited on-board storage. The document does not specify ownership details (e.g., PT owner vs. DT service provider) or explicit privacy measures (e.g., encryption). The focus is on **data storage capacity** (SQL database) and **real-time monitoring** without addressing security protocols."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (RA) for DTs, adapted with a **Physical Twin Entity** and split User Interface FE.
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements (performance class I).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (≤100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware and inter-component communication.
  - **OPC UA/IEC 62541**: Potential future reference for Data Translation FE (not implemented in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed via:
  - **Latency/Synchronization**: Enforced **≤100 ms** for deterministic control (e.g., ACC) and event ordering.
  - **ISO Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO 15622** (ACC safety) and **ISO 23247** (DT framework).
  - **Remote Management**: Assumes **secure network infrastructure** (no explicit encryption mentioned; focus is on latency and synchronization).
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: DT operates with **Human-in-the-Loop** (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin per **Liberty to act vs. Ability to act taxonomy**), ensuring operator oversight for critical actions (e.g., emergency braking)."
]
